% Report header for Pandoc → PDF
% Two-column academic report with professional styling
% Suitable for institutional reports, working papers, etc.

\usepackage{xcolor}
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{tikz}
\usetikzlibrary{shapes,arrows,positioning,calc}
\usepackage{bookmark}
\usepackage{fancyhdr}

% Page style
\pagestyle{fancy}
\fancyhf{}
\fancyfoot[C]{\thepage}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}

\hypersetup{
    unicode=true,
    breaklinks=true,
    bookmarksnumbered=true,
    bookmarksopen=true,
    hypertexnames=false,
    plainpages=false,
    pdfpagelabels=true,
    colorlinks=true,
    linkcolor=black,
    citecolor=black,
    urlcolor=blue
}
